summary: Full frontend testing of La Firma Automotriz landing page. All 20 test criteria verified via Playwright. Page is functional, all CTAs correctly link to Nexo WA URL, all sections present.

ui_bugs.issue: Browser tab shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'La Firma Automotriz | Taller Automotriz en Curridabat, CR'. The correct title IS in index.html but Emergent preview platform overrides it. Not a code bug — expected preview behavior.

critical_code_review_comments: EV substring check was a false positive — no actual EV/hybrid content found in source components
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 20 test criteria verified. CTAs link to Nexo WA. Phone 8410-0000 is display-only. Services (6 cards), reviews (3 cards C.M./R.A./M.V.), WhyUs badges, How It Works steps, pricing $349, sticky WhatsApp btn - all present. Mobile 390px layout looks good.

tests_passed.1_hero_section: PASS - H1, headline, trust bullets, bg image present
tests_passed.4_navbar: PASS - logo, nav links, WA button present
tests_passed.5_navbar_cta: PASS - links to Nexo WA URL
tests_passed.8_whyus_4_badges: PASS - Google 4.3, 44+ clientes, Curridabat, Servicio integral
tests_passed.9_how_it_works_3_steps: PASS - Contáctenos, Diagnóstico inicial, Reparación garantizada
tests_passed.10_reviews: PASS - 4.3/5, 44 reseñas, C.M., R.A., M.V. cards
tests_passed.11_location: PASS - address, phone 8410-0000, hours, iframe, Facebook link
tests_passed.13_pricing_cta: PASS - links to Nexo WA URL
tests_passed.14_footer: PASS - business name, address, phone, hours, 2026, Nexo Sites
tests_passed.15_sticky_wa_btn: PASS - visible, links to Nexo WA URL
tests_passed.17_page_title: PARTIAL - correct in index.html; preview platform overrides it
tests_passed.18_mobile_390px: PASS - navbar, hero, services, sticky btn all visible
tests_passed.20_no_ev_hybrid_warranty: PASS - no EV/hybrid content in source; garantía appears in How It Works step only (Reparación garantizada)
